race.comment: VIA VEGAS (5) massive class drop with a commanding on-pace victory over 1206m at this track with the 62.5kg. Well placed in this class and can win again from the low draw. WHERE'S THE FIRE (11) win record hardly excites and like the way he gripped on to finish third over 1000m at Taree. Will appreciate the claim from an inside draw and sure to be thereabouts. CROWIE'S SHOUT (1) locally trained gelding resuming from the sticky gate. Fitted with the two good trials and can make his presence felt with Smyth's 3kg claim. BOAMBEE BEACH (7) returned to form in the heavy going with an eye catching second over 1212m at Coffs Harbour in C3 grade. Tempo suits and can take a hand in the finish.
